landing.title: IUK Clearance System
landing.subtitle: Graduation Made Simple
landing.hero_subtitle: A streamlined, transparent, and fully digital process for graduating students to obtain clearance from all university departments.
landing.feature_1_desc: No more walking between offices with physical papers.
landing.feature_2_desc: Track your clearance status from anywhere, anytime.
landing.feature_3_desc: Generate your official clearance certificate instantly once approved.

auth.login_subtitle: Sign in to access your clearance dashboard
auth.invalid_credentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
auth.signup_hero_subtitle: Create your account to start IUK clearance process. Track your progress and get cleared efficiently.
auth.signup_subtitle: Fill in your information to create an account
auth.password_too_short: Password must be at least 6 characters long
auth.fill_student_details: Please fill in all student details
auth.provide_dept_signature: Please provide your department and draw your signature
auth.signup_success: Account created successfully! Please sign in.
auth.signup_failed: Failed to create account. Please try again.
auth.failed_reset_password: Failed to reset password. Please try again.
auth.network_error: Network error. Please check your connection.
auth.invalid_token_desc: This password reset link is invalid or has expired.
auth.reset_success_desc: Your password has been reset successfully.
auth.reset_success_alert: You can now sign in with your new password.
auth.failed_send_reset: Failed to send reset email. Please try again.
auth.forgot_password_desc: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.reset_email_sent_desc: We have sent a password reset link to your email address.
auth.check_email_inbox: Check your email inbox and spam folder for the reset link.

dashboard.no_pending_requests: No pending requests at the moment.
dashboard.override_desc: Forcefully change the clearance status for this department.
dashboard.override_note: Note: This action will be logged as an administrative override.
dashboard.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this user?
dashboard.all_approved_desc: You have been cleared by all departments. You can now generate your certificate.
dashboard.upload_photo_desc: Please upload a clear passport-sized photo for your certificate.
dashboard.photo_privacy_note: This photo will be used only for your clearance certificate.
dashboard.no_request_desc: You haven't submitted a clearance request yet.
dashboard.request_already_submitted_desc: You have already submitted a clearance request.
dashboard.request_submitted_success_desc: Your clearance request has been received and is being processed.
dashboard.departments_to_clear_desc: The following departments need to approve your clearance.
dashboard.important_notice_desc: Please ensure all information is correct before submitting.
dashboard.new_clearance_request_desc: Fill in the details below to start your clearance process.
dashboard.approve_request_desc: Are you sure you want to approve this clearance request?
dashboard.reject_request_desc: Please provide a reason for rejecting this clearance request.
dashboard.no_history_desc: You haven't processed any requests yet.
dashboard.realtime_sync_desc: The system is currently connected and receiving real-time updates for all clearance actions.
dashboard.student_actions_desc: Watch as student requests appear instantly on the dashboard.
dashboard.staff_actions_desc: Approval and rejection actions from staff are synced across all devices.
dashboard.live_updates_desc: Visual status changes and notifications happen without page refreshes.

admin_settings.title: Admin Settings
admin_settings.general_config_desc: Configure core system behavior and identity.
admin_settings.allow_new_requests_desc: Enable or disable new student clearance submissions.
admin_settings.maintenance_mode_desc: Put the system in maintenance mode for all non-admin users.
admin_settings.academic_context_desc: Set the current academic period for clearance.
admin_settings.email_notifications_desc: Configure how the system sends automated emails.
admin_settings.admin_notification_emails_help: Separate multiple email addresses with commas.
admin_settings.enable_email_alerts_desc: Send real-time alerts for critical system events.
admin_settings.alert_triggers_desc: Choose which events trigger an email notification.
admin_settings.new_requests_desc: When a student submits a new clearance request.
admin_settings.status_changes_desc: When a department approves or rejects a request.
admin_settings.staff_default_comment_desc: Comment used when staff clears a student without writing a custom comment.
admin_settings.admin_default_comment_desc: Comment used when an administrator overrides a clearance status.
admin_settings.deadlines_constraints_desc: Set time limits for the clearance process.
admin_settings.auto_archive_desc: Automatically archive completed requests after the deadline.
admin_settings.autosave_notice: Your changes are saved automatically in the background.
admin_settings.settings_saved_desc: All changes have been successfully applied.
admin_settings.settings_save_error_desc: Failed to save settings. Please try again.
admin_settings.signature_saved_desc: Your administrative signature has been updated.
admin_settings.signature_save_error_desc: Failed to save signature. Please try again.
admin_settings.admin_signature_desc: This signature will appear on official clearance certificates.
admin_settings.signature_storage_notice: Your signature is stored securely and encrypted.
